reviews.comment:
Excelente, cargan nafta y atienden amablemente.
Lo malo es que no tienen métodos modernos de pago ej. QR o la app YPF así q te perdés cualquier descuento que exista...

(Translated by Google)
Excellent, they pump gas and the service is friendly. The downside is that they don't have modern payment methods, like QR codes or the YPF app, so you miss out on any discounts...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9753367623669844910/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlOHZDNUZ3EAE

reviews.comment:
En el centro, ciudad villa cabecera. Al lado de encuentra la terminal de autobuses.
Buena atención.
Buen local.

(Translated by Google)
In the center of town. The bus terminal is right next door.
Good service.
Nice location.

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención. Baños excelentemente limpios. En el minimarket muy amable la atención. Los sánguches envasados no tan buenos.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. Spotlessly clean restrooms. Very friendly service at the minimarket. The pre-packaged sandwiches weren't that great.
